message:
feat(desktop-ui): Add persistent toolbar and analysis sidebar for desktop

Introduces three new components that surface previously hidden functionality
which was only accessible via keyboard shortcuts:

ActionToolbar:
- Persistent control bar with view mode toggles (DNA/AA/Dual)
- Reading frame selector (visible in AA/Dual modes)
- Zoom controls, diff toggle, 3D model toggle
- Quick access to Analysis, Compare, Search, Command Palette
- Includes Settings and Help buttons
- Premium focus states with double-ring outline pattern
- Subtle press effect (scale 0.97) for tactile feedback

AnalysisSidebar:
- Collapsible panel organizing 25+ analysis tools by category
- Categories: Sequence Analysis, Gene Features, Codon Analysis,
  Structural, Evolutionary, Host Interaction, Simulations
- Experience level badges (Intermediate, Advanced)
- Smooth expand/collapse animation with prefers-reduced-motion support
- Tool buttons with subtle left-border highlight on hover
- Keyboard shortcuts displayed inline with tool names
- Help button linking to full keyboard shortcut reference

QuickStats:
- Compact bar showing key phage metrics at a glance
- Displays: Length, GC Content, Gene count (with strand breakdown),
  Baltimore group, Host, Structure availability, Accession
- Uses pre-calculated gcContent from phage data (no redundant calculation)
- Subtle separators between stats with text-shadow glow on highlights
- Mobile-optimized horizontal scroll variant

desktop-ui.css:
- Complete styling for all three components
- Responsive breakpoints: 900px (hide toolbar), 1200px (sidebar),
  1440px, 1600px, 1920px, 2560px+ (ultrawide/4K)
- Comprehensive :focus-visible states for keyboard accessibility
- CSS custom properties for consistent theming

icons.tsx additions:
- IconChartBar, IconGitCompare, IconPlay, IconPause
- IconZoomIn, IconZoomOut, IconHelp, IconCommand
- IconCpu, IconGlobe, IconBeaker, IconChevronRight

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
